tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Billy Joel
We Didn't Start The Fire

Everyone seems to have this wrong, 
so here we go...the CORRECT version
____________________________________________________

MAIN LEAD RIFF (thanks Aussie, you got it right.)

[tab]E|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
B|------------12--------12----------12--------------------------------------|
G|--------1214------1214--1412--1214--1412------Repeat over and over again--|[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]|12121214--------14----------14----------14--------------------------------|
A|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
E|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

(this goes on for 16 bars until the rest of the music kicks in, and continues)
____________________________________________________

OPENING CHORDS

[ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
____________________________________________________[/tab]

VERSE

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Harry Truman, Doris Day, Red China, Johnnie Ray[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
South Pacific, Walter Winchell, Joe DiMaggio[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Joe McCarthy, Richard Nixon, Studebaker, television[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
North Korea, South Korea, Marilyn Monroe[/tab]

____________________________________________________

(INTRO RIFF is played for 4 bars)

[ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
____________________________________________________[/tab]

VERSE

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Rosenbergs, H-bomb, Sugar Ray, Panmunjom[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Brando, The King and I, and The Catcher in the Rye[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Eisenhower, vaccine, England's got a new queen[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Marciano, Liberace, Santayana goodbye[/tab]
____________________________________________________

CHORUS (intro part is the lead here)

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
It was always burning[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]
No we didn't light it[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
But we tried to fight it[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]

BRIDGE

Sputnik, Chou En-Lai, Bridge on the River Kwai[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Lebanon, Charles de Gaulle, California baseball[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Starkweather, homicide, children of thalidomide[/tab]

Exit to Bridge - Lead Guitar Part (these are hammer ons)

B|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
G|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
D|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
A|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|

____________________________________________________[/tab]
